title: Mighty Roasted Irish Beef Roast
description: A hearty and energizing Irish dish featuring a fermented and crisp crust on a roast, flavored with Tabasco sauce, cooked to perfection in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the beef roast with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder.
Heat the olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef roast on all sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the beef roast from the pot and set aside.
Add the Tabasco sauce and fermented horseradish to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the beef roast to the pot and spoon some of the sauce over the top.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast the beef for 2 1/2 hours, or until the internal temperature reaches 135 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the beef rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
